---
title: "Setting up R for your project"
author: "Claire Hayman & Mike Spencer"
format: revealjs
---

## Rationale

* Making work more portable
* Improving collaboration
* Improving reproducibility
* Saving time and effort


## In scope

* A new install (R/IDE/etc.)
* General analytical project
* Collaboration (at minimum with future you)


## Prompts: non-exhaustive!

* IDE settings
* Version control & collaboration
* Directory structure
* Packages and environments
* Data sources: online/caching/local
* Handling outputs


## Common improvements or gotchas

* `setwd()` -> RStudio projects
* `rm(list = ls())` -> `sessioncheck::sessioncheck()`
* `print()` debugging -> `icecream::ic()`

![](drake.jpg)
